preamble: Spontaneous diphthongization of the mid back rounded vowel [o] is a common historical process in Romance languages, particularly in stressed open syllables.

examples.note: Spontaneous diphthongization of Vulgar Latin short /o/ in stressed open syllables.
The mid back rounded vowel develops a high back on-glide [u].

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
